title: Dash's Custom Background Music Mod
description: A JLayer based mod that allows the user to upload MP3 files to play as background music.
body:
# Dash's Custom Background Music Mod

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1-brightgreen)
![NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-NeoForge-orange)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue)

Tired of the same old tracks? **Dash's Custom Background Music Mod** gives you total control over your game's atmosphere by allowing you to replace the vanilla soundtrack with your own music files. **_Tutorials Below!_**

---

## 🎵 Key Features

* **Total Replacement:** This mod automatically overrides Minecraft's native music system. You’ll never have to worry about your custom tracks overlapping with the default game music.
* **Easy MP3 Support:** No complex conversions needed. Simply upload your `.mp3` files and you're ready to go.
* **Per-Track Volume Control:** Fine-tune your experience with built-in volume sliders for every song you add. Make that boss theme epic or keep the building music subtle.
* **Seamless Integration:** Designed to feel like a native part of the Minecraft UI.
* **Custom Playlists:** As many playlists as you want!

---

## 📋 Compatibility

| Loader | Version | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Neoforge** | 1.21.1 | ✅ Supported |

---
## 🧑‍🏫 Playlist Tutorial
1. Go to the instance root folder.![Instance root](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caca0e046c2487293053ebdada01834c8bf46c59.png)
2. Go to the instance config folder.![Instance configs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3232fd57e04eec81146bdd75d48ce8063ab0f1aa.png)
3. Go to custom background music's config.
4. Create a new folder and name it whatever you'd like.![Our config/folder create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f38f1db10130a796bc39f9dd3e4dfb038a7ecd7.png)
5. Add your .mp3 files and launch the game!![.mp3 files](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad6638ad39ad79fc0fb49f895e5ed6940ff8a9ee.png)
   
---

## 💬 Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Will I hear the original Minecraft music?** A: No. This mod completely overrides the vanilla music engine to ensure only your custom tracks play.

**Q: Can I change the volume while a song is playing?** A: Yes! The volume buttons update the audio levels in real-time.

**Q: What file formats are supported?** A: Only .mp3 files are supported thus far, I am unfortunately not planning to add compat for other formats.

---

**Created by Dash** *Your world. Your music.*
